title: cestrum aurantiacum var. chaculanum
intro: Cestrum aurantiacum var. chaculanum, also known as the "Yellow Chalice Vine," is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is a member of the nightshade family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat a range of health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, and is also believed to have antibacterial and antiviral properties. Cestrum aurantiacum var. chaculanum can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as infusions and salves, to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
